title: Aureline shared state-class transition rule and example record
description: Boundary schema for shared state-class transition rules and worked examples frozen in docs/runtime/shared_state_machine_rules.md, artifacts/runtime/state_catalog.yaml, and fixtures/runtime/state_machine_examples/. The schema defines the closed user-visible state class vocabulary, the evidence-reconstruction vocabulary, and the shared transition-class legend so UI surfaces, automation, diagnostics, and support exports can reuse one mapping layer without inventing per-surface state names. This schema does not replace domain owners' detailed lifecycle enums; it defines the shared projection and example records that reference those owners. Adding a new user-visible state class, evidence reconstruction class, transition class, or object class is additive-minor and MUST bump state_transition_rule_schema_version; repurposing an existing value is breaking and requires a governance decision row.

state_transition_rule_schema_version.description: Integer schema version for the shared state transition rule vocabulary.

record_kind.description: Discriminator for the concrete payload shape.

opaque_id.description: Opaque stable identifier safe to log and export. Raw URLs, raw paths, and raw secret material must not appear here.

stable_ref.description: Stable lowercase reference token. It may use '.', ':', '_', or '-' separators.

monotonic_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp captured from a monotonic clock source.

reviewable_sentence.description: Short reviewer-facing sentence safe for UI tables, logs, and exports.

user_visible_state_class.description: Closed user-visible state-class vocabulary. Detailed domain state machines map into this set for shared surfaces.

evidence_reconstruction_class.description: Closed evidence reconstruction vocabulary describing how the current state was obtained.

transition_class.description: Closed transition-class vocabulary. Domain owners may add fine-grained transitions but must preserve these class labels when they apply.

shared_object_class.description: Seed set of object classes covered by the shared catalog mapping rows.

rule_id.description: Stable id for this transition rule row.

required_evidence_refs.description: Optional list of required evidence/ref classes a conforming transition should cite (checkpoint ref, audit event ref, policy decision ref).

state_transition_rule_record.description: One shared transition rule row binding a transition class to user-visible state-class endpoints.

diagnostic_substate_ref.description: Optional object-specific diagnostic substate reference that explains why the state class applies.

evidence_refs.description: Opaque refs to checkpoints, audits, policy decisions, or support evidence cited for this transition.

example_id.description: Stable id for this worked example.

object_ref.description: Opaque ref for the object instance the example describes.

timeline.description: Ordered state snapshots for this example, oldest first.

transitions.description: Ordered transition events for this example, oldest first.

state_machine_example_record.description: One worked state-machine example showing shared state classes, diagnostic substates, evidence reconstruction posture, and transition classes.
